description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized brigatinib as a monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who were previously not treated with an ALK inhibitor.
